body.u: Ah, yes; I remember in my days when we had to leave school at the age of sixteen. I left school in June after completing my O levels I had no time for fun and games revision revision that’s was it for every single night, not even television. I worked part time for 2 months over Bowaters. After that I had to work for this other firm I had an apprenticeship it was a good one too. Not like these days where apprenticeship lasting for only towtwo years I stayed at this firm for four years then my apprenticeship was completed.

I know went looking for jobs not like nowadays where this is one job forefor every 150 persons. I played Table tennis for my hobby I even won the Kent championships. I found a job in Italy when I went for my holidays. It was very hot so I only stayed on two years with this garage. Then I went back to Britain looking for a job I spent four months on the doll. My age was twenty seven and I wasn’t even married. I got a good job over in Chatham. I enjoyed it so I stayed on. I met this girl her age was twenty-four and she was nice ah yes she was a beauty. We got married two months later. We had to live with our parents then I brought myself a car. I went back and forth every day to Chatham. When we found a house it was a semi-detached in Sittingbourne. I wanted to live in Italy but that was asking for totoo much. We went to Italy for our holiday every year. I grew totoo old for table tennis so I decided to get a new hobby Kung fu. I had my first very own baby it was a boy I called him after my dad’s name Michael.

I was promoted now I was a training officer my job was to teach other boys of 16 everything that I had learned the hardest part was getting the right boy in one year. I had to interview over one hundred and fifty boys.
I had a big responsibility. But I worked hard for the promotion.
Two years later I had two more babies after that I worked for an otheranother thirty five years.
Boy was my life a bore I waistedwasted so much that I regret it. But I got three wonderful children.
